name: NMEO-OS Subsidy
description: Government subsidy to support oilseed crop adoption including mustard, groundnut, and sesame.
eligibility: Farmers growing oilseeds on more than 0.5 hectares

name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support scheme providing ₹6000/year in 3 installments.
eligibility: All registered farmers except government employees

name: PMFBY Crop Insurance
description: Insurance protection against crop loss due to weather, pests, and disasters.
eligibility: Any farmer with an active kharif or rabi crop
